summary: Base W10 (~18 mpw, §4.C) — second post-deload step-up under the permanent Tue-lift / Wed-T / Thu-off template (Adj #92). Tendons trending clean into the week (L Achilles during-only/resolving, knee quiet, Adj #105) — keep watching the AM read. Easy days must stay genuinely easy after Fri's 8:59 creep (Adj #96/#105); the tighter Wed→Fri spacing + v4.3 reshape raise the intensity fraction. Hill strides live (Adj #91) — step up cautiously toward 7–8 reps / 4–5% grade, hold cadence ≤180. Owed fresh-day run-MHR max test rolls into this week as its own session, not a finisher (Adj #9/#53/#93). Loads queued: rear-delt 130 (Adj #95) Tue; lat 160 (Adj #97), seated calf 345-eligible (Adj #102), Sat DB lat push toward 15 (Adj #99), chest fly bump-eligible (Adj #103) Sat. Holds: incline 145 (Adj #94), preacher 60 reset (Adj #100), chest-supp row 75 reset (Adj #98), pushdown 20 (Adj #101), decline crunch BW.

days.note: Easy 40 min @ 9:45–10:45 (keep it honest, Adj #96/#105) + hill strides 7–8 × 10–12s @ 4–5% grade, cadence ≤180 (Adj #91/#25). Vomero Plus (Adj #34); watch L Achilles AM read
Incline 145 hold (Adj #94); rear-delt fly bump 125→130 (Adj #95); DB lat 30 hold, preacher 60 (reset, Adj #100), pushdown 20 hold (Adj #101), decline crunch BW
Hold 8:00/mi lock — Adj #77/#93 7:50–7:55 nudge held (cooler-weather confounder); anchor RPE ≤7. Vomero Plus
Permanently off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab
Easy → last 15 @ M (8:30/mi). Candidate slot for the owed fresh-day run-MHR max test if run as its own session, not a finisher (Adj #9/#53/#93)

Bumps: lat 155→160 (Adj #97), seated calf 345-eligible on a clean set 3 (Adj #102), Sat DB lat push toward 15 (Adj #99), chest fly bump-eligible on clean RIR 2 set 2 (Adj #103); ≥6h gap, push to Sun if the long was hard
Tyler 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily clamshell / bird-dog / side plank; walking fine
